prose:
Frontier-orbital (HOMO–LUMO) gap of molecular oxygen (O₂)
Method provenance:
1. Property: HOMO–LUMO energy gap (Koopmans orbital energies), in eV.
2. Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier "standard"); no density fitting (exact four-center integrals).
3. Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates (oxygen.xyz); no further geometry optimization – single-point calculation on this fixed geometry (DFT//input-xyz).
4. Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
5. Charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state); unrestricted Kohn–Sham treatment.
6. Software: PySCF via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill (engine_subcommand "frontier").
7. Convergence & warnings: SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported; integrity.status = "ok", trustworthy = true.

Live log: the SCF/analysis output was streamed during the run to a timestamped .out file in the working directory (path given at runtime in the CLI invocation). Full JSON result saved to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp3vsxjilz/live.json.

Result:
HOMO energy = −8.8739616 eV
LUMO energy = −3.5859031 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV

No engine warnings were issued (warnings array empty).
